title: McpRegisterServerArgs
description:
Args for `register_server` (handler `11`). Mirrors an
[`crate::config::McpServerSpec`] plus a name + the contributing
plugin's reverse-DNS id. The host crate stays protocol-only per
ADR 0027; shell-side fields are intentionally absent.

args.description: CLI args appended at spawn time.

command.description: Executable to spawn — required for stdio.

disabled.description: `true` to keep the entry registered but skip spawning.

env.description:
Environment merged on top of the host process's environment
at spawn time (stdio only).

name.description: Stable server identifier (the BTreeMap key used by the host).

plugin_id.description: Reverse-DNS id of the contributing plugin.

transport.description:
Wire-level transport — one of `"stdio"`, `"http"`, `"websocket"`.
Unknown values fall back to stdio at conversion time.

url.description: Endpoint URL — required for remote transports.
